name: iroharness
description: Character macro harness for multi-body AI companions, PJOS state, and micro-harness delegation.

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/adapters/index.js && node --check examples/basic.mjs && node --check examples/body-mappers.mjs && node --check examples/file-pjos.mjs && node --check examples/browser-server.mjs
